title: Quality Quivers
body:
Quality Quivers is a datapack that adds, you guessed it, quivers!



To craft the quiver, you need two leather and one string, as shown below.

![Recipe](https://i.ibb.co/DrD8qng/image-2024-07-02-205935141.png)

To fill the quiver, simply select the quiver in your inventory, then select the arrow you want to put in the quiver.

![Filling Quiver](https://i.ibb.co/wC5578J/Untitled-video-Made-with-Clipchamp-2.gif)


To remove arrows from the quiver, hold the quiver in your off hand and switch it into an empty slot.

![Removing Arrows](https://i.ibb.co/YPgwv3b/ezgif-7-4a71883ca2.gif)


When you select a bow with a quiver in your off hand, the quiver turns into the first arrow inside it.

![Selecting Bow](https://i.ibb.co/b3kPRP5/ezgif-1-dbf0f8fcaf.gif)


To switch between arrows in the quiver, hold your quiver in the off hand and select a bow, then switch hands.

![Switching Arrows](https://i.ibb.co/4g0Zkg4/ezgif-2-0c51eff91a.gif)


This pack should be compatible with any datapack that adds custom arrows


That's all, have fun with the pack!
